bugs: BUG-1: action_tagger.py searched for status='active' but tasks table uses 'pending' - tasks were never found
BUG-2: Priority order inconsistent between schema/evening (urgent first) and morning_briefing (strategic first)
BUG-3: close_hooks.py passed dict to plan_json but update_task doesn't JSON-serialize it
BUG-4: v_tasks_today view had illogical WHERE clause (>= today OR <= tomorrow catches everything)
fixes_applied: Fixed action_tagger.py: Changed 'active' to 'pending' in status checks (lines 102, 254)
Fixed schema.sql: Updated v_tasks_today priority order to strategic-first
Fixed evening_accountability.py: Updated priority order to match morning_briefing
Fixed close_hooks.py: Added json.dumps() when passing plan dict to update_task
Fixed schema.sql: Simplified v_tasks_today WHERE clause to due_at <= tomorrow
Fixed __init__.py: Added sys.path setup for cross-module imports
Updated v_tasks_today view in tasks.db to match corrected schema
notes_for_orchestrator: All critical bugs fixed and verified. Modules now work correctly when run from /home/workspace with sys.path. Priority ordering is now consistently strategic-first across all modules. Task search now correctly filters by pending/in_progress/blocked status. Ready to wire up scheduled agents.
